case_title: THUAN HAN DU0NG VS. NOORI HAMID S. DBA SOMA CLEANERS 1

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF THUAN HAN DUONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOORI HAMID S. DBA SOMA CLEANERS 1 IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DU0NG, THUAN HAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOORI HAMID S. DBA SOMA CLEANERS 1 THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OF DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S JACKET. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT REPAIRED THE RIP IN THE PLAINTIFF'S JACKET AS CLOSELY AS PRACTICABLE TO ITS NEW CONDITION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,961.50 FILED BY DU0NG, THUAN HAN AS TO DEFENDANT NOORI HAMID S. DBA SOMA CLEANERS 1 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED: FEE FOR SERVCIE $40.00 SERVED JUL-10-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOORI HAMID S. DBA SOMA CLEANERS 1
